behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all paths (config_megatron.yaml, ref_losses_megatron.json), required keys (allocation_mode, experiment_name values 'tests-grpo'/'tests-sft'), the 16-float range (0,10), and backend pattern config_{backend}.yaml.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior (parametrize, backend-aware paths, file contents) without prescribing exact code edits or line changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for parametrize decorator with ≥2 backends and backend-dependent path pattern; multiple valid implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests parse AST, load YAML/JSON, and validate structure; not just substring checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub cannot satisfy parametrize-with-2-backends AST check and the ref_losses JSON with 16 floats in (0,10).

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction requirements (parametrize, config files, ref losses, backend-path pattern) have matching tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped with section comments (fail-to-pass, pass-to-pass static, repo_tests) and named per-requirement.

structured_data_schema.reason: YAML keys and JSON array schema (16 floats, range) are explicitly specified in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists files to look at but does not pinpoint specific buggy lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Not an agentmd-edits task; changes are code/config additions.
